title: Vrtl Pirates
html:
Vrtl Pirates is Yahir's umbrella business entity (vrtlpirates.com) — Private Company, the parent shell that has held every venture-attempt of the 2025–2026 stretch: outpace (DBA "Outpace - iMessage Step Counter"), brotein, the aeo agency / True Insights AI go-to-market, and now serves as Yahir's dogfood agency tenant inside Rankett at vrtl-pirates.visibility.rankett.com.

The infrastructure shape is consistent across the corpus: Namecheap DNS pointing to GitHub Pages, cold-outreach email running through SPF/DKIM/DMARC on the same domain (the deliverability arc visible in the September–November 2025 AEO outreach sprints), and Telnyx SMS attempts. By Feb 2026 the entity has graduated into a paid Rankett Partner Plan tenant at $299/mo (2026 02 20 screenshot 2026 02 20 at 2 24 53 pm b27de694) — Yahir validating the ghost white label flow against his own brand before pitching outside agencies. The branding-config screen (2026 02 19 screenshot 2026 02 19 at 6 45 33 pm 2125a5e1) shows the full audit-tool copy customized to Vrtl Pirates' colors.

Account email tied to it: vqlez1718@gmail.com. The persistent yahir@vrtlpirates... Google Workspace account that surfaces in nearly every browser-bookmark bar across the 2025–2026 screenshots is the operating identity behind the shell.
